Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...I don't think I ever told you about how things were before you joined.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}SEES originally started off with only three members.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Back in middle school, I invited Akihiko to join, and Aragaki followed him soon after.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...We had no idea what we were doing back then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We were young, inexperienced... and we had almost no intel to work off of.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We could barely even make it past the entrance to Tartarus back then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Actually exploring the tower, like we're doing now, was nothing more than a pipe dream.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Even with all our shortcomings, we worked decently as a team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}As peers, it was easy for us to connect, and the work was hard, but fulfilling.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...Oh, I'm sorry. I'm not complaining about our current circumstances.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We've discovered how to eliminate the Dark Hour, and we've since grown much stronger.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}However... after what happened in Yakushima, and with Aragaki rejoining... it's hard not to remember the old days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}...Maybe I'm so concerned about re-enrolling him in school because I'm still living in the past.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Some time after we started working as a team, we all came to an agreement.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We promised we'd all graduate together... No one left behind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Akihiko was just as reckless back then, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Aragaki was always the one reminding him that our lives were at stake.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Although, his wording certainly wasn't quite so thoughtful...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But, Aragaki didn't use to distance himself from others like he does now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Heh, it suits him, doesn't it? I guess you've gotten to know him well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Ever since he left the team, he's acted like he's wanted to punish himself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}It's almost like he just wants to waste away...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}I'm hoping he'll remember his promise and take a step back and look at himself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...That's why I gave you the paperwork to get him back in school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}That was my last hope, but I suppose it didn't work out. I'll tell Akihiko myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}All right, I'll take this. I'll start on the process for extending his leave of absence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like Mitsuru and Sanada were really[n]hoping Aragaki would return to school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should think carefully about[n]whether to hand this over or not...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}...Oh, sure. What's wrong, though? Is it missing a page?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'll let you handle it, then. Make sure to let Aragaki know as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Very well, thank you. I'm sorry you had to hold on to this for so long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'll take care of things from here. Make sure to let Aragaki know as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I took the leave of absence extension[n]form and left the student council room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should look for Aragaki[n]and get him to reconsider...[n]{f 1 1}
